PR surface: Source +3, Tests +63. Total +66 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: unclear. The review failed before ClawSweeper could establish a reproduction path.

target.title: fix: resolve issue #79748: deliver Feishu tool results during streaming
target.body:
## Summary

- Fix Feishu group chat message loss when browser/tool results arrive while a streaming card is active.
- Tool-result payloads now bypass only the streaming-card early return and fall through to the existing separate card/media delivery path.
- Non-tool streaming replies still use the original streaming-card path, so normal streaming behavior remains unchanged.

## Real behavior proof

- **Behavior or issue addressed:** Feishu group chats could silently drop browser/tool result messages while a streaming card was active, leaving users without the tool output and making the session appear blocked.
- **Real environment tested:** Linux x86_64, Node.js v22.22.0, PR worktree `/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-worktrees/pr-79815`, OpenClaw gateway started from the PR worktree on isolated local port 19115.
- **Exact steps or command run after this patch:**
  ```bash
  OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_PORT=19115 OPENCLAW_REPO=/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-worktrees/pr-79815 \
    /home/0668001030/.claude/skills/daily-fix/scripts/start_openclaw_dev_gateway.sh
  pnpm test extensions/feishu/src/reply-dispatcher.test.ts
  ```
- **Evidence after fix:**
  ```text
  OpenClaw gateway:
  === GATEWAY READY (5x2s) ===
  [gateway] agent model: zte/nebulacoder-cot-v8.0 (thinking=off, fast=off)
  [gateway] http server listening (8 plugins: acpx, browser, canvas, device-pair, file-transfer, memory-core, phone-control, talk-voice; 3.3s)
  [gateway] ready
  Control UI: http://127.0.0.1:19115

  Feishu dispatcher regression suite:
  Test Files  1 passed (1)
  Tests       57 passed (57)
  Includes regression coverage for:
  - delivers tool result text as a separate message while streaming card is active
  - delivers tool result with media while streaming card is active
  ```
- **Observed result after fix:** The PR worktree starts successfully, and the Feishu dispatcher tests show that text-only and media tool results are delivered as separate messages while the streaming card remains active instead of being dropped by the streaming early return.
- **What was not tested:** A redacted live Feishu group-chat run with real bot credentials, screenshots/recording, or copied live bot output was not available in this environment. This proof covers current-head OpenClaw startup and the Feishu dispatcher boundary, but it does not claim live Feishu transport proof.
- **Fix classification:** Root cause fix

## Review findings addressed

- RF-001 through RF-004: Added fresh current-head runtime startup proof plus dispatcher regression evidence. The requested live Feishu group-chat proof is still not available here, so the remaining live-transport confidence question is explicitly disclosed under `What was not tested` for maintainer decision.
- RF-005: There is no further narrow code repair to apply for the live Feishu proof gate; the code change remains focused on the dispatcher branch that drops tool results.
- RF-006: Refreshed proof on the current head with `pnpm test extensions/feishu/src/reply-dispatcher.test.ts` and OpenClaw gateway startup from the PR worktree.
- RF-007: The current PR head already has Dependency Guard passing; no rebase or force-push was needed just to refresh CI.

## Regression Test Plan

- `pnpm test extensions/feishu/src/reply-dispatcher.test.ts` — passes 57 tests, including both active-streaming-card tool-result delivery regressions.
- OpenClaw dev gateway startup from the PR worktree — reaches `GATEWAY READY` and `http server listening` on isolated local port 19115.

## Root Cause

- **Root cause:** The Feishu reply dispatcher returned from the active streaming-card branch before `info.kind === "tool"` payloads could reach the normal separate card/media delivery path.
- **Why this is root-cause fix:** The patch keeps the early return for ordinary streaming messages but lets tool results fall through to the existing delivery logic, directly preserving browser/tool output delivery without changing the rest of the streaming card contract.

Fixes #79748
target.author: zhangguiping-xydt

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
